contributions.detail: Allstate is running its own SAP Ariba beta/workshop that is directly gating the Zycus POC as of May 26, 2026, with no counter-signal since — SAP currently has the inside track.

Economic buyers Casey McDowell and Cheryl Harris have never taken a Zycus call despite repeated asks (Jan 2026 Chicago session request, Feb 2026 'asking for executive meeting w Casey/Cheryl') — EB access remains unproven.
Champion Gaurav reads as a process gatekeeper, not an advocate — no visible internal push for Zycus, and silent 46+ days on the SAP beta result.
ANA POC offered Feb 2026 still hasn't started, and references requested Jan 2026 ('need to set up different references ASAP') were never scheduled — proof points stalled 5+ months.
Decision process, decision criteria, and pain are all confirmed from real buyer sessions — 5 transcribed meetings including the 92-minute Jan 21, 2026 onsite.
Zycus's AI/innovation narrative (Swissport, Bank of Cyprus references, SMS/WhatsApp innovation vs SAP) landed well in the Jan/Feb 2026 outreach.
No buyer meeting in 169 days — last real session was the Jan 21, 2026 onsite product review; 0 meetings logged in the 30/60/90-day windows.
Champion Gaurav has not answered rep follow-ups dated June 8, June 16, or June 29, 2026 about the SAP beta outcome — one-way outreach on every recent touch.
Close date already pushed 31 days (Jun 30 → Jul 31, 2026) with no new forward evidence since.
No future meeting on the calendar and no Next Step History trail recorded — nothing dated ahead to anchor momentum.
Rep has kept a disciplined bi-weekly cadence of outreach since Nov 2025, so the account isn't abandoned even though the buyer is quiet.
Buyer has not delivered the SAP beta outcome despite three explicit rep requests (6/8, 6/16, 6/29/26) — no owned action items closed on their side.
ANA POC offered Feb 2026 never started; reference calls requested Jan 2026 never scheduled.
Paper process is a confirmed gap — commercials/proposal have been 'pending' since April 2026 with no buyer-side movement.
No exec sponsor engagement — Casey/Cheryl mapped but never confirmed on a call despite months of requests.
Allstate did commit real time in 2025/2026 — 5 transcribed demo/product sessions including a 92-minute onsite Jan 21, 2026.
SAP Ariba is running a live, unresolved internal beta/workshop with Allstate that is blocking the Zycus decision — no visibility into outcome for months.
Close date already slipped 31 days (Jun 30 → Jul 31, 2026); Ariba's 12-month renewal clock adds separate time pressure.
Zero direct economic buyer engagement — Casey/Cheryl never on a call despite repeated requests since Jan 2026.
169 days dark on real buyer meetings; champion silent 46+ days on the one thing that unlocks next steps.
Paper process gap and stalled commercials mean there's no forward mechanical motion even if the beta resolves favorably.
